Name: FEdGraphSchemaAction
Description: This structure represents a context dependent action, with sufficient information for the schema to perform it.

Variables.Name: MenuDescription
Variables.Description: The menu text that should be displayed for this node in the creation menu.

Variables.Name: TooltipDescription
Variables.Description: The tooltip text that should be displayed for this node in the creation menu.

Variables.Name: Category
Variables.Description: This is the UI centric category the action fits in (e.g., Functions, Variables). Use this instead of the NodeType.NodeCategory because multiple NodeCategories might visually belong together.

Variables.Name: Keywords
Variables.Description: This is just an arbitrary dump of extra text that search will match on, in addition to the description and tooltip, e.g., Add might have the keyword Math.

Variables.Name: Grouping
Variables.Description: This is a priority number for overriding alphabetical order in the action list (higher value  == higher in the list).

Variables.Name: SectionID
Variables.Description: Section ID of the action list in which this action belongs.
